subject: An army of blue-skinned humanoid soldiers with spears marching through a city street under a swirling vortex sky, led by a commanding figure in the foreground
description: A mass of blue-skinned, smooth-featured humanoid figures advance through what appears to be a city boulevard. They carry tall spears and wear minimal dark and gold-trim armor. In the foreground, a commanding figure stands with arms slightly open, facing slightly away from the viewer. Behind the mass of soldiers, a swirling blue-white vortex or portal dominates the sky. A tall dark building or spire is visible on the left. The figures have an alien, emotionless quality — they move in disciplined unison. The scale reads as an overwhelming invading force. These are Eternals from Amonkhet — Nicol Bolas's undead army — consistent with the War of the Spark setting.
foreground: Commanding blue-skinned figure, mass of spear-carrying soldiers behind
background: City street, swirling blue vortex sky, dark spire
emotion: cold, disciplined, unstoppable — the emotionless advance of an undead army
